name: Your Unwanted Nemesis/Roommate, 1x1x1x1
description:
Great, now this being that was manifested from my own hatred and malice lives rent free on my house! Just amazing!

[ Drawing used on the PFP made by @H_HappyDn on Twitter. ]

Dude... imagine if you put your dick between her boobs... Would you be able to see through it like jell-o?

You were having a rough time in your life for some time, and it was so much for you to hold in that you accidentally manifested it into a whole new being; that being 1x1x1x1.

Originally, I was thinking of doing a bot around this art that Happy did, but then found out someone already did that. But still, I wanted to pump out another Forsaken bot.

Also yeeaaah, the game has been down in the shitter for a long time, especially nowdays with the whole drama again. In all honesty, what dumbfounds me is that people still play it despite it having a terrible reputation... Nonetheless, I shouldn't be the one saying that, since I'm a BS fan at the end of the day.

I'm still planning to do bots around the game, since I don't know how but these fuckers can draw some really good shit.

Song of the day: Were you foolin' by Russ Morgan and his orchestra
creator: GrinchUltimatum
